second_canopy_stratum_decision.reason: CONAF records local near-pure north/east-facing groves and MMA maps an Austrocedrus chilensis - Nothofagus dombeyi evergreen association in the Futaleufu watershed
second_canopy_stratum_decision.corridor_boundary: local ecological plausibility only; exact corridor frequency and locations require aspect/elevation filtering plus guide or first-party field validation

forest_bands.terrain_relation: lower valley and wetter river-adjacent slopes
higher valley walls and colder exposed elevations

canopy_species.role: locally near-pure conifer grove and dry-slope accent

coigue_reference_architecture.bark: dark gray, initially smooth, with small vertical fissures
coigue_reference_architecture.crown: dense foliage on strong open branches with predominantly horizontal disposition
coigue_reference_architecture.leaf_form: persistent simple alternate leathery ovate-lanceolate to rhombic leaves with fine serration

first_party_asset_contract.ownership: project-authored geometry, textures, masks, materials, wind data, and procedural recipes
required_crown_behavior: broad layered silhouettes instead of top-heavy poles
continuous but nonuniform canopy mass at 60-150 m river-camera distance
horizontal strong-branch forms for adult coigue
no repeated card walls, black branch marks, or oversized leaf clumps
material_requirements: project-owned bark and leaf albedo, normal, roughness, opacity, and subsurface/transmission inputs
wind response without crown-scale phase locking
seasonal state parameters for evergreen and deciduous species

automatic_reject_conditions: canopy disappears or becomes a pole field at river distance
unbounded instance density or unmeasured performance
third-party source or derived content copied without redistribution approval

next_step: Retain V10's far fallback, exact authority, and silhouette floor plus V12's branch-scale/resource lesson and V13's connected-wood, exact-camera, provenance, and import-bounds evidence. Build project-owned opaque connected cordilleran-cypress branchlets and scale-leaf clusters for V14; no donor geometry, native label, corridor placement, or production claim is allowed without reconstruction and the full Austrocedrus gate.
